Localization.Description: A user sent a password to another user

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.name} from host {src.ip} sent a password from organization vault "{datafield3}" to the user {object.account.name} on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} from host {src.ip} sent a password from private vault "{datafield3}" to the user {object.account.name} on host {event_src.host}
